name: PhishOps Security Suite
description: Browser-native phishing defence: ClickFix detection, OAuth scope analysis, extension integrity monitoring, HTML smuggling terminal page detection.

_comments.webNavigation: Required for Wave 2 Plan C: chrome.webNavigation.onCommitted listener in dataegress/background.js detects blob: URL navigations. blob: scheme cannot be matched in content_scripts[].matches — programmatic injection via chrome.scripting.executeScript is the only supported approach.
_comments.scripting: Required to call chrome.scripting.executeScript() from dataegress/background.js to inject blob_credential_detector.js into blob: frames.
_comments.webRequest: Required for Wave 1 Plan B: OAuthGuard state parameter abuse detection in background/service-worker.js.
_comments.web_accessible_resources: blob_credential_detector.js must be declared as web-accessible so chrome.scripting.executeScript can inject it into blob: frames. The files[] form of executeScript references the extension file path, which requires this declaration.
